checks.name: preflight_branch_authorized
checks.detail: Governance stream on main — no L0-L8 domain overlap

checks.name: canonical_execution_lane_defined
checks.detail: Protected scope covers all PATH A components: orchestrator, qualification, topology, propagation, Q-class, S-state, Evidence Record, signals, personas. 10 rules defined.

checks.name: marketplace_experimentation_lane_defined
checks.detail: Allowed scope covers projection templates, L0 connectors, advisory tooling, commercial packaging. 10 rules defined. Projection-only authority enforced.

checks.name: substrate_evolution_lane_defined
checks.detail: Scope covers EXSIG/TIMSIG/RISKSIG/FLOWSIG/ORGSIG, cross-plane reconciliation, temporal qualification. 10 rules defined. Promotion protocol specified.

checks.name: branch_strategy_complete
checks.detail: Main freeze policy, branch taxonomy (14 patterns), naming rules, merge governance defined. Extends git_structure_contract.md without conflict.

checks.name: contamination_patterns_complete
checks.detail: 8 forbidden contamination patterns (CP-1 through CP-8) defined with examples, rules, and detection patterns

checks.name: layer_protection_matrix_complete
checks.detail: 10 layers covered (L0, L1, L2, L3, L4, L5, L6, SQO, REPORTS, SIGNALS, QUALIFICATION, PROJECTION). Protected/Allowed/Forbidden specified for each.

checks.name: implementation_entry_sequence_complete
checks.detail: Phase 0/1A/1B/2 defined with lane classification, branch pattern, entry criteria, exit criteria, and per-item governance classification

checks.name: merge_reconciliation_contract_complete
checks.detail: 10-check mandatory reconciliation checklist (RC-1 through RC-10). Authority model defined. Failed reconciliation protocol defined. No exception process.

checks.name: architectural_warning_preserved
checks.detail: Verbatim warning from contract preserved in §7: 'The primary risk is not code instability. The primary risk is epistemological contamination...'

checks.name: git_structure_contract_compatibility
checks.detail: Branch taxonomy extends existing git_structure_contract.md — does not conflict with or replace existing branch domains (feature/pios-core, feature/activation, feature/runtime-demo, feature/governance)

checks.name: non_goals_verified
checks.detail: Stream produces governance artifacts only. No adapters implemented. No marketplace features. No PATH A modification. No EXSIG/TIMSIG. No PiOS derivation changes. No runtime APIs. No LENS runtime behavior alteration.
